title: strychnos holstii var. reticulata
intro: Strychnos holstii var. reticulata, also known as the African poison nut, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos holstii var. reticulata include reducing fever and pain, treating malaria, and acting as an antidote for certain poisonings. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
